claim_text: We achieved all three targets for 2025, with all new in-scope projects implementing net positive impact plans; biodiversity enhancement plans in place at 100% of our major operating sites in sensitive areas; and funding provided for eight restoration projects in the UK, Trinidad and Tobago, Brazil, Azerbaijan, Georgia, Türkiye and the US.
we took part in the consultation process for the implementation of RED III in Germany and Spain, and in the Netherlands, where we also have refining operations.

By 2025 100% of high-risk tier 1 suppliers evaluated in line with our (LRMS) principles and priority findings raised with suppliers to be remedied.
Our methane intensity was 0.04%, significantly ahead of the 0.20% target, due to improved operational performance.

In 2025 the average carbon intensity of the energy products sold was 79gCO2e/MJ, meaning we achieved our target to reduce the average lifecycle intensity by 5% by the end of 2025 (against the 2019 baseline).
In 2025 the number of reported oil spills increased to 110 compared with 96 in 2024 and 100 in 2023.
